title: Utan Heat Wave
lead: Utan is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.31. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Utan has brought the city to a standstill, with temperatures soaring to record highs.
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.6 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems. The humidity level is at 74%, making the heat feel even more oppressive, with a gentle breeze of 1.7 km/h offering little relief.
 The city's infrastructure is under strain, with the Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG, highlighting the unusual nature of this heat wave.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave in Utan.
